description_long: This is a compact, canister-style vacuum cleaner with a predominantly dark gray and teal color scheme. The body is rounded and robust, featuring a large, integrated handle at the top for easy carrying. Two sizable wheels are mounted on either side, designed for smooth rolling across floors. The front panel displays branding and control elements, including a prominent dial and a recessed area likely for hose attachment. The rear side has a visible vent and a label, with the power cord compartment and exhaust port also apparent. The overall design is functional and ergonomic, suitable for urban cleaning tasks in garages, sidewalks, or indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A compact, dark gray and teal canister vacuum cleaner with a large handle, two wheels, and visible control elements on the front.
description_view_0: The left-front view highlights the large handle, one of the wheels, and the front control panel with branding and a dial.
description_view_1: The direct front view shows the full face of the vacuum, including the handle, both wheels, branding, and the main control dial.
description_view_2: The rear-left view reveals the back vent, label, and the power cord compartment, as well as both wheels.
description_view_3: The direct rear view focuses on the exhaust port, label, and the back of the handle, with both wheels visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The front panel displays a visible brand logo with the text 'Zelmer' and 'elf3' in blue and white lettering.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a large, integrated, curved grip at the top center, molded from the same plastic as the body, with a smooth ergonomic shape for easy carrying.
attribute_wheel_type: Two large, round, plastic wheels with a solid core and rubberized tread, positioned symmetrically on either side of the base.
